textByHash.dc62446e427b2c652ce9ee2bc8ddf8eb9af64d83: Hello, I'm Horace. Welcome to my shop. Would you like to buy or sell something?
textByHash.9060c616b195104a3b7e7d13ac6c3c30c15f207c: Not as far as I can recall. Councillor Hughes used to order things from time to time, before she was arrested. None of the others have ever shopped here though.
textByHash.38be68a7c66cdc4e042888ed3ddb2a66547b82f3: Welcome to my shop. Would you like to buy or sell something?
textByHash.d6ea2c80c7e5e6defafc226a2999788ec01111fc: Well, well my friend! I've lived in this great and glorious house all of my life. I'd be happy to share with you anything you'd like to know!
textByHash.cf4ce8c1c2a0b70ce1f6d8684e5426f8e990a229: The Hosidius house is filled with keen and skilled farmers alike! Lead by the incredibly efficient Kandur Hosidius, his intelligent resourcefulness ensures optimal agricultural production.
textByHash.a890f3551672e6fd239db0373b25ba44dea84635: Our fields stretch as far as the eye can see. With incredible teamwork and group efforts, the ability to provide the majority of Great Kourend's people with both food and herbal supplies is quite literally the fruits
textByHash.9824506acc9bd56665517b0478aed9803731a707: Not into your back-breaking field maintenance or fertiliser creation? Those wishing to gain favour within our city may need to maintain such tediousness for a small while, though stick to it. The rewards for
textByHash.e4e1aa84855117dc2ddf28ee76472c7baaa37b85: that painful work are nothing short of great!
textByHash.33fea4ca1216e0af847fa5cd54078a82448c7201: Access to our personal kitchens, Spirit Tree patch and Allotment space is lovely. That being said, our vinery and Tithe farm are world class and exclusive to only the most loyal of our house.
textByHash.5e9a344e57d9685448dd79428ad4a431c5b1e9ad: Anytime, friend! Feel free to pop along if you ever need any wares!
textByHash.057a55cfa339ae9215b431a1d3aa00a471477724: Well, well my friend! I've lived in this great and glorious city all of my life. I'd be happy to share with you anything you'd like to know!
textByHash.754edda0f613ae6886dfb7baf48608ed85e01016: Absolutely. I'm always up for a chat with any of my new patrons!
textByHash.13d7da526e33c09658da471860aac9d4556d282d: Hosidius is filled with keen and skilled farmers alike! Lead by the incredibly efficient Kandur Hosidius, his intelligent resourcefulness ensures optimal agricultural production.
textByHash.326b2ab21d3c0f7c447b94810fd9d2f986fcce35: Our fields stretch as far as the eye can see. With incredible teamwork and group efforts, the ability to provide Great Kourend's people with food and herbal supplies is quite literally the fruits of our labour.
textByHash.f5138897394546a453f7484dac68d74029bd32f1: Our personal kitchens and farming patches are lovely. That being said, the real gems of Hosidius are the vinery and Tithe farm. Both are world class!
textByHash.cc1b308603d89ea72bcac80d6c20b949c77071bf: Hello my friend, my name is Horace! You're in the city of Hosidius. Most everyone round here tends the farms. Without us, Kourend would have no crops at all.
textByHash.b710dc13ffffb3c0cc9db9aa10100b136966d7f2: So, do you need to buy or sell something today?
